name: Happy Family Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless beef chuck (sirloin top or round), cut into 2-inch cubes
4 cups Canned plum tomatoes (with juice), chopped
1 cup Mild green chilies, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough oil to cover the bottom of a large, heavy pan until it is sizzling.
2. Dry the meat well; add enough oil to the pan to brown without crowding. Brown on high heat, turning when brown on one side; continue browning until all sides are completely brown. Remove and set aside.
3. Repeat with the remaining meat.
4. Reduce heat; add onions and garlic to the pan. Cook over low heat until soft.
5. Return the meat with its juices to the pan. Add the next six ingredients; bring liquid to a boil. Reduce heat, cover partially, and simmer for 2 to 3 hours or until the meat is tender.
6. With a knife or spoon, break the meat into bite-size pieces. Season with salt and pepper and serve over rice.
